rulings.Case Title: ANTHONY LAMPERTI et al VS. U.S.BANCORP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion For Equitable Relief Striking Defts Motion For Costs And Atty Fees On Appeal On Error And Constitutional Grounds ; Declaration; Memo Of P And A
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, MAY 18, 2007, LINE 10. PLAINTIFFS ANTHONY LAMPERTI AND ELIZABETH LAMPERTI'S Motion For Equitable Relief Striking DEFENDANTS Motion For Costs And ATTORNEY Fees On Appeal On Error And Constitutional Grounds IS DENIED. THIS IS AN IMPROPER ATTACK ON THE DECISION BY THE COURT OF APPEALS DETERMINING THAT U.S. BANCORP IS ENTITLED TO AN AWARD OF ATTORNEYS' FEES. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: ANTHONY BOWLES VS. MICHAEL S LOVE et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, MAY 18, 2007, LINE 13. DEFENDANTS MICHAEL LOVE AND PHYLLIS LOVE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PROOF. PLAINTIFF DID NOT CREATE A MATERIAL DISPUTE OF FACT; PLAINTIFF DID NOT DEMONSTRATE BY CLEAR AND CONVINCING EVIDENCE MALICE, FRAUD OR OPPRESSION AS REQUIRED BY CIVIL CODE SECTION 3294. EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS TO BE RULED ON AT THE HEARING. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES GRINDSTAFF et al VS. HECO COMPOSITES INC FKA HORTON- EARL COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, MAY 18, 2007, LINE 16. DEFENDANT PARKER BOILER COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILED TO SHIFT THE BURDEN. DEFENDANT DID NOT DEPOSE OR PRESENT EVIDENCE AS TO WHAT THREE WITNESSES WOULD TESTIFY REGARDING PARKER. THE DANENHAUR DECLARATION IS INADMISSIBLE. THE CRITICAL FACTS APPEAR TO BE BASED ON SPECULATION. =(302/PJM/KD)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES GRINDSTAFF et al VS. HECO COMPOSITES INC FKA HORTON- EARL COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, MAY 18, 2007, LINE 16. DEFENDANT THOMAS DEE ENGINEERING COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PROOF. PLAINTIFF, IN FACT, PROVIDED A RESPONSE TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND DID NOT SIMPLY OBJECT TO THE DISCOVERY. PLAINTIFF PRESENT NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT. OBJECTION TO DEPOSITION OF THOMAS DEE'S IS SUSTAINED. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: RICHARD MORGESE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Release Property From Mechanics' Lien
